steps.title: Use the positive evidence
steps.content: Frequent citations show that other economists use Reed's work and find it valuable. The dash after the blank confirms this: her research is useful to peers because they rely on it in their own scholarship.

steps.title: Choose the reinforcing verb
steps.content: A means prevents, B means makes less noticeable, and C means contradicts or gives a false impression of. The needed word means emphasizes or highlights the usefulness of her research. The answer is D.
